race.comment: Even contest with many chances. THURMOND (3) got things back on track last start when second up from a spell, making late inroads to get up for third over 2400m at Geelong. Scored at his only other third-up run. Ready to peak at the right time. SHOGUN EXPRESS (8) has failed to feature in two runs this preparation. Ready to put it together now out to a more agreeable journey. JENNY THE BEAVER (14) doesn't win out of turn but boasts a better than average top three strike-rate for a stayer. Whacked away over 2400m at Geelong last time. At her peak now. FLASHLIGHT (2) has been freshened up since failing over this trip at Bendigo on 2 May. Form before that was hard to knock. Trialled well at Traralgon recently so should be up for this. TSITSIPAS (4) showed a glimpse of form last time out at Geelong and can make further progress at the fourth run back from a spell.
